com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type

Packages that use com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type
Package
Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of Guava types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
 
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type
 
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type.part
 
  • Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type used by com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
    Class
    Description
    CollectionValidator
    Validates the state of a Collection value.
    PrimitiveUnsignedIntegerValidator
    Validates the state of an int value that supports negative values.
